params.TriggerDescription: Eerie — Whenever CARDNAME or another enchantment you control enters and whenever you fully unlock a Room, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it.
Eerie — Whenever CARDNAME or another enchantment you control enters and whenever you fully unlock a Room, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it.

params.Description: Stun counters can't be removed from permanents your opponents control.
